title: Devflow
description: Stack Overflow-style Q&A community platform built with Next.js and MongoDB for developers to share knowledge and solve problems.

title: Finlytics
description: Personal finance analytics app for tracking spending, visualizing trends, and managing budgets with interactive dashboards.

title: Lead CRM
description: Customer relationship management system with lead tracking, pipeline views, and contact management built on Django.

title: WooStore
description: Full-featured online shopping platform with product catalog, cart, checkout flow, and order management.

title: Doomflix
description: Video streaming platform replica with browse UI, authentication, and Firebase-backed content delivery.

title: Multi-Tenant Finance CRM
description: Full-stack CRM built from scratch with the founding team — deals pipeline, contract e-signing, a configurable workflow engine, and Stripe billing. MVP live with real users in 5 months.
highlights: Built CRM core: companies, deals pipeline (lead → won → onboarding), contacts with many-to-many linking, and saved views.
Developed offer composer with services, bundles, and pricing; contract templates with Criipto digital signing.
Integrated Stripe subscriptions, Google/Microsoft SSO, MFA, and KYC/KYB via Signicat.

title: Working Capital & AI Forecasting
description: Built a Working Capital module and Scenario Builder for financial modeling, plus an AI forecasting commentary layer (OpenAI/DeepSeek), with Xero/QuickBooks integrations cutting manual data entry by 70%.
highlights: Built Working Capital module (AP/AR tracking, liquidity projections) and Scenario Builder for financial modeling.
Integrated Xero/QuickBooks OAuth 2.0 — 70% less manual data entry.
Built AI forecasting commentary layer (OpenAI/DeepSeek) with usage-based billing.

title: ClickHouse Analytics Engine
description: Built a QueryBuilder on ClickHouse for high-volume analytics, cutting query complexity by 40%, plus ad-platform integrations (Shopify, WordPress, Google/Meta Ads) and a Chrome extension.
highlights: Integrated ClickHouse for high-volume analytics; built a QueryBuilder reducing query complexity by 40%.
Built WordPress, Shopify, LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, and Meta Ads integrations.
Developed a Chrome extension for IP-based traffic exclusion and custom Shopify/WooCommerce apps.

title: Microservices Migration on GKE
description: Migrated Flask microservices (Corrections, Attorney Mail, Physical Mail) to async FastAPI on GKE — 50% faster responses — with SSO, JWT feature flags, and zero-downtime CI/CD.
highlights: Maintained 3 production microservices (Corrections, Attorney Mail, Physical Mail) on GKE.
Migrated Flask to FastAPI with async refactoring — 50% response time reduction, 60% less boilerplate.
Enforced GitLab CI with a 95% Pytest coverage gate and zero-downtime rolling deployments.

title: Peerlogic — Dental Conversational AI
description: Conversational AI receptionist for dental practices — integrated VoIP providers (GoTo, Bandwidth, RingCentral, NexHealth) via a GCP Pub/Sub pipeline for real-time call streaming and audio processing.
highlights: Integrated VoIP providers (GoTo, Bandwidth, Netsapiens, RingCentral, NexHealth) via a GCP Pub/Sub pipeline.
Configured webhooks and cloud functions for real-time call streaming and audio processing.

title: Secure Tax Office
description: Led data modeling and transformation for a county tax-sale platform — engineered the Tax Sale, Deduction, Disbursement, and Reporting modules used across dozens of jurisdictions.
highlights: Led data modeling and transformation for the platform.
Engineered Tax Sale, Deduction, Disbursement, and Reports modules.

title: Tax Collector
description: Architected the database and built RESTful APIs for a tax-collection platform, integrated with Secure Tax Office across 50+ parishes.
highlights: Architected the database and developed RESTful APIs.
Integrated with Secure Tax Office across 50+ parishes.

title: Tasdeeq
description: Financial analytics platform — reporting, budgets, and credit analytics modules in Django, with Vertica DB pipelines for large-scale data processing.
highlights: Developed and optimized system modules for financial reporting and budgets.
Built forecast analytics features using Python and Django.
Worked with Vertica DB for large-scale data processing.
